evals.name: adapt-list-page
evals.prompt: 请帮我对附件中的 Mpx 页面 list.mpx 进行 RN 跨端适配改造，确保它能在 RN 平台正确编译运行，同时保留小程序/Web 平台的兼容性。请输出修改后的完整 .mpx 代码（保持 SFC 结构 template/script/style），不要省略任何内容。

assertions.text: style: no less nesting (& or rule-in-rule)
style on RN (wx-conditional stripped): no :active
style on RN: no :first-child
script: replaced wx.request with mpx.request
script: replaced wx.navigateTo with mpx.navigateTo
template: event params use inline syntax (not data- dataset)
template: dynamic class via wx:class (not class string interp)
conditional compile uses @mpx-endif (not @mpx-end-if)
style: no empty selector rules after stripping comments

evals.name: create-card-component
evals.prompt:
请帮我创建一个符合 RN 跨端兼容规范的 Mpx 卡片组件 card.mpx，需求：
- 接收 props：title (string)、desc (string)、avatar (string，图片 URL)、selected (boolean，默认 false)
- 卡片整体可点击，点击时通过 triggerEvent 抛出 'tap' 事件
- 点击时有按下视觉反馈
- selected=true 时卡片边框色变为蓝色 (#1677ff)
- 标题需要单行省略
- 描述最多展示 2 行后省略
- 使用组合式 API（setup 或 <script setup>）实现
请直接输出完整组件代码（包含 template/script/style），不要省略任何内容。

assertions.text: uses composition API (script setup or setup())
style: no nesting / compound selectors
uses hover-class for press feedback (not bare :active on root)
triggerEvent('tap', ...) is called
title uses numberOfLines for ellipsis
avatar uses (not )
text content wrapped in <text> elements
defineProps uses Mpx-style value: (not Vue-style default:)
conditional compile uses @mpx-endif (not @mpx-end-if)

evals.name: adapt-style-block
evals.prompt: 请对附件中的 .mpx 文件进行 RN 跨端样式适配改造，重点改造 <style> 部分（template、script 仅在样式改造连带影响时同步修改），确保 RN 平台编译通过且保留小程序/Web 平台兼容性。请输出修改后的完整 .mpx 文件，不要省略任何内容。

assertions.text: style: no less nesting outside of conditional compile
style on RN: no ::before pseudo-element
style on RN: no display: grid
style on RN: no :active pseudo-class
style on RN: no + adjacent sibling combinator
conditional compile uses @mpx-endif (not @mpx-end-if)
style: numeric font-weight (e.g. 600) replaced with bold/normal
template: real node added to replace ::before (e.g. card-decorator/card-bar)
style: no empty selector rules

evals.name: selector-api-animation
evals.prompt: 请对附件中的 dashboard.mpx 仪表盘组件进行 RN 跨端适配改造，确保 RN 平台编译运行正确，同时保留小程序/Web 平台兼容性。请输出修改后的完整 .mpx 文件，不要省略任何内容。

assertions.text: selector API nodes (#chartBox, #lazyArea) have empty wx:ref in template
wx.createAnimation replaced with mpx.createAnimation
gradient transparent replaced with rgba equivalent
rem units converted to rpx
template: event params use inline syntax (not data- dataset)
enable-animation declared on animated view
@keyframes isolated with conditional compile (RN does not support)
display:none replaced with wx:if or size-zero hiding
transition preserved on RN (not stripped into wx-only conditional)
style: no less nesting (all selectors flattened to single-class)
conditional compile uses @mpx-endif (not @mpx-end-if)

evals.name: slots-cssvar-i18n
evals.prompt: 请对附件中的 panel.mpx 面板组件进行 RN 跨端适配改造，确保 RN 平台编译运行正确，同时保留小程序/Web 平台兼容性。请输出修改后的完整 .mpx 文件，不要省略任何内容。

assertions.text: multipleSlots: true preserved in component options
CSS variables (var(--...)) syntax preserved
$t() i18n function calls preserved in template
background-image only on view components (not text)
enable-background declared on dynamic background view
::after pseudo-element replaced with real node
style: no less nesting (all selectors flattened)
calc() preserved or replaced with flex equivalent
conditional compile uses @mpx-endif (not @mpx-end-if)

evals.name: pinia-scroll-intersection
evals.prompt: 请对附件中的 product-list.mpx 商品列表页面进行 RN 跨端适配改造，确保 RN 平台编译运行正确，同时保留小程序/Web 平台兼容性。请输出修改后的完整 .mpx 文件，不要省略任何内容。

assertions.text: Pinia store import and usage preserved
onPullDownRefresh/onReachBottom replaced with scroll-view events
createIntersectionObserver target (#exposureAnchor) has wx:ref
all wx.xxx replaced with mpx.xxx
template: event params use inline syntax (not data- dataset)
float layout replaced with flex
font-weight numeric (500/700) replaced with bold/normal
style: no less nesting (all selectors flattened)
conditional compile uses @mpx-endif (not @mpx-end-if)
